vocab.meaning: vùng hoang dã nguyên sơ (chưa bị con người tác động)
vocab.example: Hiking through the northern highlands, I was awestruck by the vast stretches of unspoilt wilderness.
The rooftop bar offers a breathtaking panoramic view of the entire city skyline at sunset.

vocab.meaning: đường bờ biển gồ ghề, hiểm trở
vocab.example: We spent the afternoon driving along the rugged coastline, stopping frequently to admire the sheer cliffs.

vocab.meaning: những ngọn núi đỉnh phủ tuyết
vocab.example: The sight of the snow-capped mountains reflecting in the lake was truly a sight to behold.

vocab.meaning: những thung lũng xanh tươi mỡ màng
vocab.example: The train journey takes you through several verdant valleys dotted with quaint little farmhouse villages.

vocab.meaning: lớp màn nhiệt lung linh (thường thấy ở sa mạc hoặc đường nhựa nóng)
vocab.example: Looking across the dunes, the shimmering heat haze made the distant mountains appear like a dream.
The ancient temple is an architectural marvel that has survived centuries of natural disasters.

vocab.meaning: những con phố lát đá cuội cổ kính
vocab.example: I fell in love with the quaint cobblestone streets of the old town, which felt like stepping back in time.

vocab.meaning: một dải màu sắc rực rỡ, lóa mắt
vocab.example: The coral reef was home to a dazzling array of colors that I had never seen before in nature.

vocab.meaning: những dòng thác đổ xuống liên tiếp
vocab.example: We hiked deep into the jungle to find the cascading waterfalls that the locals had told us about.
